Headline: #95 95th |Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Burley/92nd
ShortDescription: Eastbound 95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 92nd and Buffalo: due to, street blockage near Burley/92nd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 92nd and Buffalo: due to, street blockage near Burley/92nd.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
